title: Ticket-shape rubric
description: Validates DSL frontmatter against tracer-bullet / unit-of-work shape constraints. Two modes: epic-alone (stage 1) and epic-with-graph (stage 2 child creation).

epic_alone.description: Applied when an epic is created without children (stage 1 of two-stage approval flow).

constraints.message: epic must declare a single domain (e.g. 'auth.sso'); domain is the bundle-prevention contract
epic must declare its single demoable artifact
epic must name at least one out-of-scope item — declaring what you're NOT doing prevents bundling
epic body exceeds 192-word soft cap (~250 tokens). Compress or move detail into children.

task_in_graph.description: Applied to each child task in a `bd create --graph --parent=<epic-id>` payload (stage 2).

constraints.message: child must be type=task or type=bug
child must list ≥1 file (path glob) under `files`. Empty `files` is the empty-molecule failure mode.
child must list ≥1 verification command under `verify`.
child must list ≥1 acceptance criterion under `ac` (EARS form).
task body exceeds 115-word soft cap (~150 tokens). Move detail into design notes after creation.

graph.description: Applied to the full --graph payload as a whole (epic + children together).

constraints.rule: exactly one child has tracer === true
constraints.message: graph must have exactly one child marked tracer:true. The tracer is the thin end-to-end slice that proves the path before fan-out.

constraints.rule: all children's files[] share an ancestor matching epic.domain mapping in domain-map.json
constraints.message: Children's files do not all live under the epic's declared domain. Either the children belong to different epics, or the domain declaration is wrong, or this is a bundled multi-domain epic.

constraints.rule: every child's parent matches the epic's id
wave is array of arrays, length >= 1
constraints.message: molecule must declare wave[] mapping (list of lists of child ids). A bare 'Swarm orchestrating epic <id>' wrapper is rejected.
molecule must declare coordinator (named role/agent or coordination directive).

bypass.description: Bypass exists for spec-verifier discovered-from filings and emergency cases. Each bypass is append-logged.
